scenarios.name: Scheduled backups retain daily and weekly history

evidenceRefs.location: internal/backup/retention.go — RetentionPolicy and SelectKept implementing 7 daily + 4 weekly slot accounting with ISO-week awareness
scripts/commands/backup.sh — Python retention re-implementation mirroring the Go algorithm so cron-only environments prune correctly
docs/Operations.md — Backup & Restore section enumerates retention policy and how it interacts with deploy adapter schedule
docs/Deployment.md — Spec 048 Deploy Adapter Backup Contract section forbids adapter overriding retention slot counts

linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: SCN-048-B01: T-048-001 passes and proves scheduled backups retain daily and weekly history (7 daily + 4 weekly, older artifacts pruned without deleting retained points)
Scope 1 DoD: T-048-002 passes and docs preserve product-vs-adapter ownership

scenarios.name: Restore test proves application state is recoverable

evidenceRefs.location: scripts/commands/restore-test.sh — gunzip | psql against disposable postgres on tmpfs with no published host port
internal/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql — schema referenced by the restore assertions
docs/Operations.md — Backup & Restore section documents operator workflow for restore drill

linkedDoD: Scope 2 DoD: T-048-003 passes and proves restore health on disposable storage
Scope 2 DoD: T-048-006 passes and artifact lint confirms feature compliance

scenarios.name: Connector tokens and cursors survive restore

evidenceRefs.location: scripts/commands/restore-test.sh — sync_state table reachability assertion (canonical connector cursor store)
scripts/commands/restore-test.sh — psql stdout/stderr scan rejects any closed-set secret env value
internal/backup/status.go::Status.validate() — rejects last_error containing closed-set secret prefix
scripts/commands/backup.sh::redact_secrets() — scrubs 14 closed-set secret env values before writing status file or emitting log lines
internal/db/migrations — sync_state table is the canonical primary cursor store across drive, photos, recommendations, hospitable, twitter connectors

linkedDoD: Scope 2 DoD: T-048-004 passes and proves connector state survives restore
Scope 2 DoD: SCN-048-B03: T-048-005 passes and proves connector tokens and cursors survive restore without secret values being printed in logs
